name: PSM

methods.name: mint_musd
methods.desc:
USDC → mUSD at 1:1, no fee. Self-balancing — vault ceiling unchanged.
Atomic group: AppCall mint_musd(amount) + AssetTransfer(USDC → PSM, amount). The USDC lands in PSM from the outer-group AssetTransfer; PSM sends mUSD to caller.

methods.name: redeem_musd
methods.desc:
mUSD → USDC at 1:1 with redeem_fee_bps fee routed to treasury.
Atomic group: AppCall redeem_musd(amount) + AssetTransfer(mUSD → PSM, amount).
usdc_out = floor(amount × (10_000 − redeem_fee_bps) / 10_000) fee_out  = amount − usdc_out   (sent to treasury wallet in USDC)

methods.name: issue_musd
methods.desc:
Mint mUSD to recipient — called by vault as cross-app inner transaction.
Enforces the core invariant: circulating_musd + amount ≤ psm_usdc_balance. Only the registered vault contract can call this (AUD-038).

methods.name: receive_musd
methods.desc:
Account for mUSD returned to PSM reserve — called by vault via inner transaction.
mUSD arrives physically at PSM via the outer-group or sibling-inner AssetTransfer handled at the vault level. PSM's ASA balance increases regardless; this call lets PSM note the return for any future accounting (no Gtxn assertion — AUD-062).
Security: only the registered vault app address can call this.

methods.name: deposit_usdc
methods.desc:
Admin deposits USDC into PSM, expanding the vault ceiling.
Atomic group: AppCall deposit_usdc(amount) + AssetTransfer(USDC → PSM, amount).

methods.name: withdraw_usdc
methods.desc:
Admin withdraws USDC from PSM.
Guard (AUD-034): psm_usdc_balance ≥ circulating_musd + amount Written as addition to avoid uint64 underflow from the subtraction form.

methods.name: set_redeem_fee
methods.desc: Set mUSD→USDC redemption fee. On-chain cap: 500 bps (5%).

methods.name: set_treasury
methods.desc: Set treasury wallet for redemption fee routing. Zero address rejected (AUD-011).

methods.name: set_vault_contract
methods.desc: Register the vault contract authorized to call issue_musd / receive_musd.

methods.name: opt_in_asset
methods.desc:
Opt PSM contract account into an ASA (mUSD, USDC).
Must be called for both ASAs before first use.

desc:
MagnetFi v2 Peg Stability Module.

    Holds USDC reserves and the non-circulating mUSD reserve.
    Core invariant: circulating_musd ≤ psm_usdc_balance  (enforced at issue and withdraw).

    circulating_musd = total_musd_supply − psm_musd_asa_balance
    vault_ceiling    = psm_usdc_balance − circulating_musd

    Public:   mint_musd, redeem_musd
    Vault:    issue_musd, receive_musd   (Txn.sender must be registered vault app address)
    Admin:    deposit_usdc, withdraw_usdc, set_redeem_fee, set_treasury, set_vault_contract

sourceInfo.errorMessage: invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
musd and usdc must be different assets
